overall.description: Nighttime gameplay footage from GTA V showing a first-person walk along a highway sidewalk in Los Santos. The camera moves steadily past the illuminated Maze Bank Tower toward the Maze Bank Arena, with wet asphalt reflecting city lights and moderate vehicle traffic flowing on the highway below.

scene_state.functional_zone: highway roadside with curved glass tower

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk next to the highway, observing the flow of traffic and the illuminated Maze Bank Tower

notable_agents.action: multiple cars driving along the multi-lane highway

entered.detail: tall curved glass skyscraper with illuminated windows dominating the skyline
sunken highway with multiple lanes of moving traffic
low red brick wall running along the edge of the sidewalk
tall street lights illuminating the highway and sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment opens with a view of the iconic Maze Bank Tower standing prominently against the night sky. The camera walks steadily along a sidewalk bordered by a brick retaining wall, with a busy multi-lane highway running parallel. Street lamps cast pools of light on the wet asphalt while cars flow continuously on the highway below.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition zone between tower and arena district

events.description: Maze Bank Arena becomes visible on the right horizon as the tower shifts to the left

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk as the urban landscape transitions from the financial district to the arena district

entered.detail: large circular sports arena with bright ARENA signage and white facade
line of palm trees along the approach to the arena
parked blue convertible sports car visible along the curb

segments.scene_description: As the camera progresses, the Maze Bank Tower gradually shifts to the left periphery while the massive Maze Bank Arena emerges into view on the right. Palm trees line the approach to the arena, and a blue sports car becomes visible parked along the roadside. The highway continues to carry moderate traffic alongside the walkway.

events.description: purple spotlight beams become visible shining into the sky above the arena

agents.ego_description: approaching the Maze Bank Arena entrance, passing closely by the parked blue sports car

notable_agents.action: blue sports car parked along the curb being passed by the camera

entered.detail: tall modern skyscraper with extensive blue lighting and illuminated windows
purple spotlight beams projecting upward into the night sky from the arena

segments.scene_description: The final segment brings the camera close to the Maze Bank Arena, which now dominates the right side of the frame. The Maze Bank Tower has passed out of view behind the camera. Purple spotlight beams cut through the night sky above the arena, and a tall illuminated skyscraper rises in the background. The blue sports car is now at close range on the right as the camera continues its forward progression along the wet sidewalk.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person walk along a city sidewalk that shifts from a view of the towering Maze Bank Tower to the illuminated expanse of the Maze Bank Arena. It begins with the camera moving steadily past a brick retaining wall and a busy multi-lane highway, where street lamps reflect off the wet asphalt. As the camera progresses, the Maze Bank Tower gradually drifts to the left periphery while the massive arena and a line of palm trees emerge on the right, passing a blue sports car parked by the roadside. The scene then opens up as the tower disappears behind the camera and the arena dominates the frame, with purple spotlight beams cutting through the night sky. Finally, the camera draws close to the parked blue sports car and the arena's facade, with a tall illuminated skyscraper rising in the distant background.
